'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 73''' was the seventy-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 21]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Ruusan campaign|Battle of Ruusan]]
*[[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious Crumb]]
*[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*[[Rancor/Legends|Rancors]]
*[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] - Air Shafts
*[[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] [[Analysis droid/Legends|Analysis Droids]]
*[[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] [[Static pike/Legends|Static Pike]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell's]] Weapons
*[[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]]
